title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Inorbit Malls in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!
